name: Pressureholt
descriptionSeed: A city that is also a machine, and the citizens are also, in a sense, its maintenance. Everything here has a function, a schedule, and a failure mode that somebody has written down. The Enginewrights are warm, actually — the warmest people you will meet — but their warmth expresses as MAINTENANCE: they will fix your boots, your argument, and your marriage, unasked, and be genuinely hurt if you object.
encounterFlavor: Wrights who repair things you were still using; an apprentice who has taken something apart and cannot rebuild it; a machine that has been running since before the Transition and nobody dares stop it.
questSeeds: Something in the city's own mechanism is failing and the Wrights cannot find it, which has never happened
A Wright has begun repairing PEOPLE, in the way Halvex Coil repairs people, and does not see the difference
worldPosNote: Ordinary ground within the_gearlands, on its bearing. (SNG-180: authored position — WHERE it sits. Independent of axisVector, which is WHAT it is; a bastion is where the two disagree.)
